pre_game.message: Hey, I'm H. First time doing something like this? I gotta say, I'm pretty nervous but also excited—got a lot riding on this for me and my family. What brings you here today?

Hey H, yeah first time for me too—honestly pretty nerve-wracking. My family got evicted recently and we found a place we can afford, but we need 30 grand for the deposit and first two months. This game feels like maybe our shot, you know? What's your situation?

Man, that's rough—I really feel for you. I'm in a similar boat honestly, got a loan payment due next month for 25 grand and I'm stressed out of my mind about it. This game is basically my lifeline right now too. We're both counting on this, huh? Hopefully we can both walk out of here with something good.

Yeah, man, it's tough when you're in that position. At least we're both here now with a real chance at this. I'm hoping we both come out ahead—we deserve a break, you know? Let's see what this game's all about.

Absolutely, man. We both got skin in the game here. I'm just hoping the rules are fair and there's actually a real opportunity to win big. You know anything about how this thing works, or are we going in blind together?

Honestly, I'm going in blind too, man. All I know is there's a shared prize pool and we'll get a chance to take money from it before the game starts. Beyond that, I guess we'll figure it out together when they explain the rules. Hopefully it's straightforward and everyone gets a fair shot.

Yeah, fair shot is all we can ask for, right? I'm just gonna play it smart and see how it goes. We'll figure it out when they lay out the rules—hopefully there's a real strategy to it and not just pure luck.
Yeah, totally—strategy over luck would be ideal. Either way, I'm just glad I'm not doing this alone. We'll figure it out when they explain everything. Good luck, man—I got a feeling we both got this.
Thanks man, I appreciate that—same to you. We got this. Let's both walk out of here with enough to fix our situations, yeah?
Absolutely, man. We both got families counting on us—let's make this happen. I'm feeling good about this.
Hell yeah, man. Let's go out there and do this. We both deserve this break—stay sharp and I'll see you on the other side.
